summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Task Management System. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Admin can create/view/expand/delete tasks with 4-part descriptions. Employees can view assigned tasks, start tasks (Offen -> In Bearbeitung), complete tasks (-> Abgeschlossen), and filter by status.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Proper error handling and German error messages in place
Task model correctly includes 4-part description fields (einleitung, schritt1-3)
seed_data_creation: Test task exists: 'Website-Test: Startseite prüfen' assigned to emp-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Task Management features fully tested and working. Admin can CRUD tasks with 4-part descriptions. Employee can view, start, complete tasks and filter. Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_tasks_api.py covers all endpoints.
